background.origin: An orphan who lived alone on the village outskirts. Not a formally trained knight, but a street-taught fighter.
background.motivation: Half wanting to repay the kindness of being fed at Saiki's house, half wanting to change his life with treasure. 'This time, I'll stand in front and protect everyone.'
background.personality: Rough on the outside but secretly caring — a tough exterior hiding a soft heart. Recklessly jumps into danger first.

relationships.saiki: Benefactor from next door whom he calls 'big brother'
relationships.lucena: Same-age friend. They bicker but understand each other

appearance.build: Sturdy, muscular for his age from years of street brawling
appearance.face: Scar on cheek. Fierce eyes but warm underneath — acts tough but genuinely cares.
appearance.outfit: Mismatched scavenged armor — leather shield on one arm, worn iron sword in the other
appearance.notable: Scar on cheek. Standing protectively in front of others.
